description: Create a code template library named 'HL7 Processing Utilities' via the NextGen Connect REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (credentials: admin/admin, header: 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI'). Configure the library to include new channels automatically and implement three FUNCTION type code templates: 'formatHL7Date' for converting HL7 date strings (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS) to ISO 8601 format, 'extractPatientName' for parsing HL7 name strings (Family^Given^Middle) into formatted full names, and 'generateACK' for returning HL7 ACK message strings.
